entry.name: ForceUnmaximizeOnOpen
entry.label: Force new windows to open unmaximized

entry.name: PrimaryOutputName
entry.label: Primary output name
entry.whatsthis: Name of the monitor to treat as primary (for example DP-1).

entry.name: IgnoredApps
entry.label: Ignored apps
entry.whatsthis: Comma-separated app identifiers to ignore (desktopFileName, resourceClass, resourceName).
